antiScamPolicy.inviteLinks: Only owner/approved roles should post invite links.
antiScamPolicy.mediaLinks: Use Media & Links Approved role and designated media/showcase channels.
antiScamPolicy.fakeFiles: Direct users to official download/security pages and quarantine suspicious files.
antiScamPolicy.sensitiveData: Never post full license keys, emails, HWIDs, tokens, cookies or payment details.
antiScamPolicy.liveAutomationStatus: SOURCE ONLY until Discord bot is deployed and permissions are verified.
